title: Map: Make the tldraw MCP server a first-class planning tool for agents
description: wayfinder map (see .seeds is the tracker). NOTES: MCP server giving an agent a live tldraw board as a planning tool; agent loop make→track→decide-next→resume; users often small non-vision models (need text read-back). Skills: /domain-modeling,/prototype,/verify,/grilling. Prefs: verify headless, no AI attribution on commits, small forgiving tool surface, working tree uncommitted. DECISIONS SO FAR: nextActionable=ready-set verb (deps done, not done/blocked) [na01]; durable plans persist per-board JSON, load on room create [dp01]; deleteBoard removes room+file [bd01]; node ownership owner=agentId, assignNode defaults to self, nextActionable(owner)=mine+unowned [no01]. FOG: plan→execution feedback loop; plan templates; persistence eviction/GC.

title: nextActionable — expose the plan's ready-set as a verb
description:
Add nextActionable tool: return nodes whose every predecessor is done, not itself done/blocked. Roots ready. Cycles don't hang. Output [{id,label,status}]. From DIVERGENCES #1 (Strong). KILL: wrong ready-set on diamond A→B,A→C,B→D,C→D with A done (expect B,C).

RESOLUTION: DONE: nextActionable tool + graph.readySet(). Ready-set = nodes not done/blocked whose every predecessor is done. Verified diamond A→B,A→C,B→D,C→D with A done → [B,C]; then [D]; blocked D → [].

title: Durable plans — persist each board's graph across restarts
description:
Persist per-board graph (nodes/edges/frames/freeform/stepIds) to server/boards/<id>.json (gitignored), debounced write on mutation, load in getRoom. Positions recomputed by layout. From DIVERGENCES #2 (Strong). KILL: a board not identical after daemon restart.

RESOLUTION: DONE: daemon persists per-board {graph,freeform,stepIds} to server/boards/<id>.json (debounced 500ms), loads in getRoom. Positions persisted too. TLDRAW_PERSIST=0 disables. Verified board identical after restart.

title: deleteBoard — remove a persisted board
description:
Once boards persist to disk, an agent needs to delete one (clearBoard only clears the in-memory graph, and the file would resurrect it on next load). Add deleteBoard tool + daemon endpoint: drop the room, delete server/boards/<id>.json. Graduated from Fog per user note 2026-07-11. KILL: after deleteBoard, a daemon restart still reloads the board.

RESOLUTION: DONE: deleteBoard tool + daemon deleteBoard command drops room + rm file + broadcasts clearGraph. clearBoard clarified as graph-only. Verified deleted board stays gone after restart.

title: Node ownership — assign plan nodes to agents
description:
owner field + assignNode(id,owner) + nextActionable(owner?) filtering. GRILLING (open Qs): owner free string vs tied to agentId/colour? unowned actionable node shows for all or none? handoff/notification in scope? From DIVERGENCES #3 (Worth-exploring; demand user-stated not observed). KILL: ready-set-by-owner doesn't partition a two-owner plan.

RESOLUTION (grilled 2026-07-11): owner=agentId string; assignNode defaults to caller's agentId; nextActionable(owner) shows owner's ready nodes + unowned (shared pool). Verified 2-owner partition. DEVIATION: node colour stays status-driven (more useful for a tracker) rather than owner-coloured — owner is surfaced in describeBoard instead.
